title: Xia Ming Kezhan
synopsis:
Performing operas? Gaining points through food? The modern lifestyle of martial arts practitioners is surprisingly interesting!

What would it be like if a chivalrous person lived in modern times, possessing martial arts skills not to surpass others, but to protect the weak?

Young heroes gather at the inn, embarking on a hilarious and exciting modern daily life, competing in food, honing their martial arts skills, and upholding justice amidst the chaos!

(Source: Douban, translated)
